title: Cobblemon Swap Pokeball
description: A datapack addon for Cobblemon that allows the current ball of a capture cobblemon to be changed in survival mode.
body:
Tempt your slot 1 cobblemon into swapping balls by holding a sugar in your main hand, a new ball in the off-hand, and then crouching.

A single sugar and a single ball will be consumed.

Have fun!

[Buy me a coffee!](https://ko-fi.com/dicedom)

Thanks to [TheBlindBandit6](https://modrinth.com/user/theblindbandit6) for updating it to CM 1.5 for me!

And thanks to PinotTheCorsky for making the Gravelmon version!
